column1: Great view of how bands set up. You can see them here. Very heavy downpours spin through, then a break. Then the next band moves in. This will be around (especially WEST of I-75) all day.

But we are a few days in this time. Hopefully all will pass soon and everyone stays safe

VA is beautiful, but not for me in the winter. I'm cold by nature so I love the summers here.
